summary: Atlas closed a strategic add-on and expanded lender coverage. Revenue grew 8% quarter over quarter, with EBITDA margin improving to 21%.
Summit progressed to IC with reimbursement diligence still open. Management expects payer mix improvements in the second half.
Mariner resolved two servicing exceptions and improved collections performance. Burn multiple declined from 1.8x to 1.5x.
Cedar added three enterprise customers and remains ahead of plan. Gross retention held above 95% during the quarter.
